scenarioName: Preserve repeated calls in the execution proof

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Preserve repeated calls in the execution proof
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: All acceptance criteria should be verifiable through the provided 'report.md' and Gemini live-call receipt, demonstrating that repeated calls are preserved, summarized correctly, and presented clearly in the report and any dense table projections.
steps.observedResult: No verification was possible due to the absence of the 'report.md' and Gemini live-call receipt. The Gherkin alone is insufficient to confirm the implementation.
